channel.title: Jailbreak on Research Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Jailbreak on Research Portfolio

item.title: Multi-Turn Jailbreak Datasets and Post-Training Hardening (SFT + DPO)
item.description:
Problem

Placeholder: the need for robust multi-turn jailbreak defenses and compliant refusal/redirection.

Why the problem is hard

Placeholder: why automated pipeline design and post-training alignment for jailbreaks are challenging.

System design

Placeholder: SoC attack pipeline → dataset transformation → SFT + DPO workflow.

Architecture diagram

Implementation details

Placeholder: attack construction, (query, refusal/redirection) data format, SFT/DPO setup.

Experiments

Placeholder: baselines, multi-turn jailbreak benchmarks, refusal/redirection quality metrics.

Results

Placeholder: tables or figures on attack success rate vs. defense, compliance, and usability.
